title: Meet Our Team
subtitle: The passionate minds behind Chakrawal Digital

members.name: Choeng Rayu
members.bio: Founded Chakrawal Digital in 2023 after seeing local businesses struggle with off-the-shelf software that did not fit Cambodian workflows. Leads client strategy and manages partnerships with education and government sectors.

members.name: Rithi Reach
members.bio: Architects the technical stack for all client projects. Specializes in React/TypeScript frontends and Node.js backends. Previously built internal tools for a local NGO before joining full-time.

members.name: Yen Mara
members.bio: Builds brand presence and client relationships for Chakrawal Digital. Crafts targeted outreach strategies that connect Cambodian SMEs with the right digital solutions for their scale.

members.name: Tep Somnang
members.bio: Ensures every project ships on time and within scope. Manages agile sprints, client communication, and quality checks across design, development, and deployment phases.

members.name: Povpanha Ngovseng
members.bio: Handles pricing, contracts, and resource planning. Analyzes project ROI and helps clients understand the financial impact of digital transformation before they commit.

members.name: Prak Dararith
members.bio: Coordinates day-to-day project tasks and client feedback loops. Acts as the bridge between technical teams and business stakeholders to keep everyone aligned.
